name: Tote
description:
Authentic Hermes Fourre Tout MM tote in classic navy blue canvas with khaki green striped handles. This is one of Hermes’ most popular everyday bags, known for durability, structure, and timeless minimalist design.

Bag is in excellent condition with no visible signs of wear. Canvas is clean and structured. Corners are sharp. Interior is very clean with no stains or odors. Snap closure works perfectly. All stitching is tight and intact.

Features multiple exterior pockets and a spacious interior with zipper pocket, making it perfect for everyday use, work, travel, or diaper bag.

Size MM which is the medium size and most desirable for daily use.

Approximate measurements
Length 16.5 inches
Height 12.5 inches
Depth 4 inches
Handle drop about 4.5 inches

Made in France tag present

This bag is lightweight but very durable and holds its shape well.
